meaning: n.杜罗(西班牙及通用西班牙语美洲国家值1 比索的银元)
examples: The son of Luke Skywalker and his wife, Mara Jade Skywalker, he was born shortly after the Battle of Duro.
When the Empire came into power and seized control of Duro, it began mining operations near the ancient Valley of Royalty.
La palabra Robot tiene su origen en la palabra checa robota, que significa "un trabajo duro y tedioso".
El mercado es duro pero es el mercado.
